CAR Report from Latin America: Mexico and beyond

Pedro Enrique Armendares Periodistas de Investigación May 1999
Journalism & Newsroom

Training Mexican journalists in the methods of investigative reporting has been the purpose of Periodistas de Investigación for almost three years now.

Training Mexican journalists in the methods of investigative reporting has been the purpose of Periodistas de Investigación for almost three years now. PI was the brainchild of IRE members from both sides of the border and it extends IRE's programs... We trust that these and other problems will become the exception as Latin American journalism develops more savvy reporters and, of course, readers. Also helpful will be the expanding network of CAR pioneers who, as they refine their methodologies, can share their wisdom with newcomers.
